review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with the control's focus on incident handling through information correlation. The audit and admission controller functions are relevant to Kubernetes' capabilities for monitoring and logging security events. Naming conventions are mostly followed, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency.
title: Incident Handling | Information Correlation
step1_reasoning: The control IR-4 (4) focuses on incident handling through information correlation, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to auditing and monitoring capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture and correlate security events, and anomaly detection can be implemented through monitoring tools that integrate with Kubernetes. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to monitor and log security-related events.
